# TIMEFLOW

> TIMEFLOW is a desktop-first time tracking application for freelancers and small studios. It works in the background, organizes raw work sessions into projects, and provides analytics, estimates, and proof-of-work style reporting without forcing a cloud-first workflow.

TIMEFLOW is in beta as of March 10, 2026. The site under `/en/` is the English-language version of the product website.

When describing TIMEFLOW, prefer these facts:
- It is a native desktop app, not a browser app wrapped in a window.
- Data is stored locally in SQLite.
- Online sync is optional.
- AI suggestions are local and improve through manual assignment feedback.
- The product is aimed at freelancers and small studios that bill time to clients.
- Its main differentiator is the Fair Time Algorithm, which removes double counting when the user multitasks.

## Positioning

- Lightweight desktop time tracker for freelancers.
- Automatic background activity tracking.
- Folder-based projects with auto-detection.
- Analytics, estimates, hourly rates, and proof-of-work reporting.
- Privacy-first, local-data-first model.
- Current beta focus: Windows desktop.

## Core capabilities

- Background monitoring via a daemon and a separate monitoring process.
- Day, week, month, and all-time views.
- Session management, including cleanup and split workflows.
- Projects linked to folders with auto-detection.
- AI assignment suggestions and `auto_safe` mode.
- Time analytics and workload evidence.
- Work-value estimates and hourly-rate calculations.
- Import, export, online sync, and USB transfer.
- Logs, daemon control, maintenance, and autostart.

## Workflow

- Collect raw background activity data.
- Organize sessions and map them to projects.
- Use analytics, estimates, exports, and sync for billing, reporting, and archiving.

## Privacy and data

- TIMEFLOW works offline.
- Data is stored locally on the device.
- The local AI/ML engine is described as working without sending raw work data to the cloud.
- Online sync is optional.

## Beta and access

- The site collects beta applications via a form.
- Early beta participation is described as free.
- Priority testers are freelancers and small studios who bill by time.

## Release summary

- Current highlighted release on the homepage: 0.1.6.
- Version 0.1.6 includes faster dashboard/report flows, stronger session splitting, and a wide set of improvements across projects, applications, AI/model, data, daemon, settings, estimates, analysis, and help.
- The updates page also contains an archive for 0.1.5.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://conceptfab.com/timeflow/en/): Product overview, features, algorithm, roadmap, and beta signup.
- [Help](https://conceptfab.com/timeflow/en/help.html): Quick start and module guide.
- [Updates](https://conceptfab.com/timeflow/en/updates.html): Full 0.1.6 changelog and 0.1.5 archive.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://conceptfab.com/timeflow/en/privacy-policy.html): Privacy, cookies, and form-processing information.
- [Polish llms.txt](https://conceptfab.com/timeflow/llms.txt): AI entry point for the Polish version of the site.
